# Rustic Retreat Weddings

> A family-owned, off-grid camping wedding venue on 65 private acres near Lac La Nonne, Alberta - about 1 hour northwest of Edmonton. Opened to weddings in 2025. One wedding per weekend, exclusive property access, overnight camping included for up to 60 guests (tents and RVs), no mandatory vendors.

## Site Information
- Name: Rustic Retreat Weddings
- Base URL: https://www.rusticretreatalberta.ca
- Location: Near Lac La Nonne, Alberta, Canada (99 km northwest of Edmonton)
- Season: June through September
- Phone: (780) 210-6252
- Email: rusticretreatalberta@gmail.com

## Summary
Family-owned since 2006 by Wilf and Patsy Ouimet. Their son Chris and his wife Shannon moved to the property full-time after their own wedding here in 2019 and opened to weddings in 2025. Three packages available: 2-day weekday ($5,000), 3-day weekend ($6,500), and 5-day ($7,500, most popular). All include exclusive property access, a newlywed cabin for 4, overnight camping included for up to 60 guests (tents and RVs, boondocking-style; 8 RVs included, maximum 15 RVs total), ceremony and reception seating for 80, and a curated décor collection at no extra cost. No mandatory vendors, no per-plate catering minimums, and bring-your-own bar with no corkage fees (host requires an AGLC Special Event Licence). Well-behaved pets welcome. GST not included.
